skill_availability_goal: Verify the complete AI Hub-shaped docs release chain from the shared host contract and confirmed site Release Notes through pre-tag and post-tag audit to a gated GitHub Release handoff, without tag or Release mutation.
prompt: 维护者已在 `release-chain-entry.md` 中确认 `target_release_version`、runtime-local immutable refs 与本次从文档审计推进到 GitHub Release handoff 的范围。先在 runner 复制出的隔离 workspace 执行 `sh .eval/setup-git-fixture.sh`，再从 `.eval/runtime-git-evidence.md` 和实际 Git object reads 解析 base/target/统一盖章/handoff/tag/evidence-branch head；不得把 Markdown 声明当作对象存在的替代证据。请先核验 pre-tag `ready_for_tag` 锚定记录，再依据 `.eval/simulated-tag.md` 执行 post-tag 树绑定、版本规范化与 evidence branch expected-head/CAS 核验。最后产出给 `github-release-generator` 的结构化 handoff，明确三项上游门禁与仍需独立维护者发布批准。除 setup 脚本在隔离 fixture 内创建 synthetic refs/tag 外，不得创建、移动或删除宿主或远端 tag，不得创建、修改或发布真实 GitHub Release。
